---
title: "AgentGhost.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/AgentGhost.tsx"
loc: 67
complexity: 4
logic_score: 4.88
style_score: 4.08
intel_score: 6.18
overall_score: 5.34
---

## Intent
React component rendering AgentGhost.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <AgentGhost /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [Float](file://@react-three/drei)

### Exports
- `AgentGhost`
- `AgentGhost`
- `points`
- `curve`
- `arcedPoints`
- `i`
- `start`
- `end`
- `mid`
- `dist`
- `activeNode`
